description: Lock stone_paved_courtyards to the source-backed Gobekli Tepe megalithic enclosure scope, not generic market courtyard paving.

checks.reason: The node is dated to the source-backed Pre-Pottery Neolithic 10th-9th millennia BC enclosure evidence.
The remaining prerequisite should preserve the shaped-stone construction capability supported by UNESCO's limestone-pillar evidence.
The source-backed scope is ritual megalithic enclosures, not urban market-square infrastructure.
The cited source does not establish standardized measuring rods or marked lines as a prerequisite.
